svg.text: Auth: Bearer token in Authorization header | Pagination: cursor-based
Heartbeat: ping/pong every 30s | Auto-reconnect: exp. backoff 1s-30s
State recovery: re-fetch last N messages on reconnect | Max 1 active WS per user
Stale data policy: Serve stale + background refresh when provider unavailable | Max stale: 2x TTL
Prefetch active trips' conditions before morning briefing deadline | Retry 3x with exponential backoff
